description:
Early Stage Technology Company Advisor | Non-Executive Director UniQuest | Angel Investor | Mentor + ⏩You know how all the clients you'll ever work with are on LinkedIn, right? But you struggle to generate meaningful engagement online that actually converts to sales with them? Well, that’s what I help with...👇

I help consultants sell their services by showing them how to optimise, draw attention, warm up leads and close sales. 

Need proof? Don't listen to LinkedIn trainers that have no results - take a look for yourself! Every day, my content gets thousands of views and huge engagement, that drives leads, opportunities and sales for my services.

Need more proof? Check out the testimonials here on my profile.

Ways I help consultants leverage this same process:
👉🏽Telling your business' story through effective content
👉🏽Driving engagement that results in interest, engagement, messages and requests
👉🏽Market in a way that warms an audience and places you at the front of mind
👉🏽Keeping ROI in mind with a focus on conversion rather than just gaining views

When it comes to selling your consulting services through LinkedIn, I know you want to get the return for all the effort that went into learning your craft and deciding to pivot to a consulting role. 
You also want to create an experience that connects your audience and builds your brand. So, you need to leverage an effective strategy on LinkedIn to grow, connect, and scale your work! 

To do that, you need to create an engaging and powerful brand on LinkedIn. But also understand how to close a steady stream of sales on the platform. So, 𝗵𝗼𝘄 𝗱𝗼 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗱𝗼 𝗶𝘁? I'll show you.

✅I’m proud to have helped businesses from 9-figure to solopreneurs build their brand. I've also taught hundreds of clients over the world how to sell using LinkedIn through my coaching, courses and lectures. 

✅You deserve to be seen by thousands, grow your audience and prosper using LinkedIn. Contact me to find out about the LinkedIn Client Accelerator program.

Send a message and we can discuss how to fix the all important conversion issue for you.
